description: Standard spool types for common hydraulic valve series. Loaded on first startup to eliminate cold-start problem and avoid unreliable vision extraction. v1.2: added Bosch Rexroth 4WE6 entries (20 spools) with canonical_patterns aligned to Danfoss equivalents per the cross-reference work — enables Rexroth→Danfoss matching via canonical_spool_pattern. v1.1: corrected 6C/8C/33C/2AL descriptions, added topology + hand_build fields, added 22A/22AL/7C/31C/52C, removed 6CL. Convention: terminal 'L' suffix = spring-offset left-hand build.

schema_notes.topology: Valve port-position topology: '4/2 single-solenoid', '4/3 double-solenoid', or '4/2 double-solenoid'.
schema_notes.hand_build: Solenoid mounting orientation: 'left', 'right', or 'symmetric' (4/3 double-solenoid valves are symmetric by default). 'L' suffix in spool_code indicates left-hand build.
schema_notes.canonical_pattern: FAMILY|solenoid-a-energised|solenoid-b-energised. For 4/2 single-solenoid spools, the second action describes the energised position. Family is the matching key (BLOCKED/OPEN/TANDEM/FLOAT/REGEN/SELECTOR/ASYMMETRIC).
